3166060.name: MK-ULTRA Psychic Defense Demo
3166060.description:
An early demo for the upcoming game "MK-ULTRA Psychic Defense".

In this demo you play as a victim of the CIA run Gate program. You have been subjected to a series of illegal experiments allowing you consciousness to ascend into the astral plane. Use a variety of different towers to defeat waves of enemies that are trying to attack the central tower of your consciousness.

Key Features

  • Utilize up to 13 different towers to defend yourself from endless waves of enemies

  • Unlock a new tower at the beginning of each enemy wave

  • Procedural expansion of the landscape to create a unique map with each run
